name: contact-deduplication
description: Detect and flag duplicate contacts based on email or name matching

matchField.description: Field to use for duplicate detection (e.g., Email, Phone)

autoMerge.description: Whether to automatically merge duplicates (use with caution)

elements.instruction: Add a Get Records called Find_Duplicates to get Contact records where {{matchField}} equals the triggering record's {{matchField}} and Id not equals the triggering record's Id
Add a decision called Check_Duplicates with rule Has_Duplicates if Find_Duplicates has records then Flag_Duplicate, otherwise End
Add a record update called Flag_Duplicate to update the triggering record, setting {{duplicateFlagField}} to true
Add an action called Notify_Admin to send email to admin about duplicate contact detected
